meta.title: Lee Smith on Egypt and the Muslim Brotherhood.
meta.description: Visiting Fellow Lee Smith spoke about the situation in Egypt and the Muslim Brotherhood during an event titled, "Egypt, Its Revolution and Future: How Should the U.S. Respond?" which was held at Hudson Institute on February 8th.
